creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
reePOPs (http://www.freepops.org / http://sf.net/projects/freepops) released a new version of their webmail-to-POP3 solution FreePOPs. Since no-one seems to be maintaining the port, I am submitting a patch.

The basic webmail-to-POP3 service has been tested, the updater and it's gui have NOT been tested as I have no GUI on my system....

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
